hardware.gpu: none on this host (nllei01gpu01 exists but hosts interactive services; do not monopolize)

standing_load_constraint.what: CSA sufficiency sweep (operator-sanctioned, resumed 2026-07-10 00:04, scheduler PID 1567604)
standing_load_constraint.footprint: ~20 nice-10 workers, load ~31/32; ~14 GiB RAM in use host-wide
standing_load_constraint.policy: LOGOS-2 must NOT starve the sweep. Until it completes: LOGOS-2 compute capped at 6 workers, all nice >= 15, RAM <= 8 GiB. After sweep completion: cap rises to 24 workers (75% of 32), RAM <= 20 GiB.

policy.disk_min_free: max(20 GiB, 15%) = 87 GiB on this 584 GiB filesystem
policy.checkpointing: every long job checkpoints per cell; a failed/timed-out cell never terminates unrelated experiments
policy.pilots_first: every experiment runs a pilot (recovery + leakage + calibration gates) before full promotion

environments.campaign_venv: research/logos2/.venv (gitignored) - created at preflight; ortools + z3-solver + python-sat installed there; frozen to environment.txt per experiment

network.policy: downloads only from citable, licence-checked sources; every download recorded in DATA_INVENTORY.csv with URL, date, licence; no scraping behind auth walls; licensed raw vendor data never committed

seed_policy.per_run_seed: sha256(master_seed || experiment_id || cell_id || fold || replicate) -> lowest 31 bits; no fork-inherited module-global RNG (each worker constructs its own numpy Generator from the derived seed)
